finding_results.notes: The exclusivity turn now carries a selfish Eli line, concrete work and divorce pressure in-scene, and an immediate post-pause lie that risks payment and future rush work.
Eli now arrives through his own work and hotel circumstances as well as callbacks, and the freezer callback now creates hesitation and correction instead of another clean validation.

summary: Revised chapter 02 to break the repeated attunement pattern, sharpen the exclusivity pressure with present-tense stakes, and make Lena's pause decision produce an immediate professional lie.
